name: Windows Roadmap 300 Batch 02
description: Executable batch generated directly from the Windows 300-scenario roadmap.

tests.name: DLL Search Order Hijacking: benign contrast
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded

tests.name: WMI Event Subscription: response readiness
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded

tests.name: Registry Run Keys / Startup Folder: driver backed
tests.fallback_command: cmd.exe /d /c "reg add HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v TamanduaBenchRun /t REG_SZ /d tamandua-bench-run /f & reg query HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v TamanduaBenchRun & ping -n 8 127.0.0.1 > nul & reg delete HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v TamanduaBenchRun /f"
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded

tests.name: Scheduled Task: telemetry contract
tests.fallback_command: cmd.exe /d /c "schtasks.exe /Create /TN TamanduaBenchTask /SC ONCE /ST 23:59 /TR %ComSpec% /RU SYSTEM /F > nul & schtasks.exe /Query /TN TamanduaBenchTask & schtasks.exe /Delete /TN TamanduaBenchTask /F > nul"
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded

tests.name: Windows Service: atomic safe
tests.fallback_command: cmd.exe /d /c "sc.exe create TamanduaBenchSvc binPath= %ComSpec% start= demand > nul & sc.exe query TamanduaBenchSvc & sc.exe delete TamanduaBenchSvc > nul"
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic fallback evidence for an Atomic candidate; not Atomic upstream proof
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded

tests.name: Local Account: caldera chain
tests.fallback_command: cmd.exe /d /c "net user tamandua_bench P@ssw0rd123! /add & net user tamandua_bench & net user tamandua_bench /delete"
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded

tests.name: Web Shell: correlation storyline
tests.fallback_command: cmd.exe /d /c "echo ^<%% tamandua webshell canary %%^> > %TEMP%\tamandua-webshell.aspx & type %TEMP%\tamandua-webshell.aspx & ping -n 9 127.0.0.1 > nul & del /f /q %TEMP%\tamandua-webshell.aspx"
tests.claim_boundary: deterministic roadmap evidence; upstream claims require matching upstream lane artifacts
telemetry_contract_notes: process_create remains the strict endpoint telemetry expectation
T1505.003 accepts file_modify/file_delete as Windows file-system evidence when the create edge is coalesced or missed
live_response_command_completed is accepted only as tamandua-ctl live-response audit evidence when endpoint collection is unavailable or not_loaded
